# Etra: Names & Cultures — moran culture overrides
# Generated by generate_mod.py from config.yaml
# Each culture is reassigned to its own dialect for regional name variants.

# === MORAN CULTURES ===

REPLACE:early_moran_culture = {
	language = early_moran_dialect
	color = map_BYZ
	tags = { undead_gfx greek_gfx east_mediterranean_gfx mediterranean_gfx eastern_european_gfx european_gfx }
	culture_groups = {
		moran_group
		undead_group
	}
}

	language = late_moran_dialect
	color = color_culture_cappadocian_greek

		moran_group
		undead_group
	}
}
